mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EB_USER (USER_ID, USER_NAME, BRANCH_ID) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{branchId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM EB_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT u.USER_ID AS userId, u.USER_NAME AS userName, u.BRANCH_ID AS branchId, u.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, e.EVENT_ID AS eventId, e.EVENT_TYPE AS eventType, e.EVENT_STATUS AS eventStatus FROM EB_USER u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT USER_ID, EVENT_ID, EVENT_TYPE, EVENT_STATUS, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY USER_ID ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC) AS RN FROM EB_EVENT ) e ON u.USER_ID = e.USER_ID AND e.RN = 1
ORDER BY u.CREATED_AT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
